Stories: This island is vast. In the darkness it consumes the ship.
You watch the ship lights fade away behind trees as you climb.
As you approach the island, you can hear the screech of bats.
The island rises like a wave over the horizon.
The ship lists heavily to one side as you dodge a submerged rock.
You jump off the boat and your boots sink into the sand.
The stench of rotting seaweed burns your nostrils.
You smack a mosquito drinking your blood.%It leaves a stain.
Barely a sandbank, why are you here?
The skipper panics to turn before running over the island.
There's little need to disembark, you can see the entire island from the ship.
